transcript: Speaker A: 90 days. That's how long until March. Where will your English be in 90 days? If you do nothing, same as today. Same fears, same hesitation. If you practice with me 10 minutes a day, that's 900 minutes of speaking practice. That's 150 conversations. That's a completely different level. I'm Loora, your AI English tutor. 90 days will pass anyway. The question is, will you use them? Start today. Download Loora, see the difference in 90 days.

summary: An AI avatar named Loora challenges viewers to improve their English over the next 90 days. She explains that practicing just 10 minutes a day accumulates to 900 minutes of speaking practice. The ad ends with a call to action to download the Loora app.
